get_web_ticket.comment: Fetch bili_ticket (anti-spider cookie). Implemented at src/core/ticket.ts; bypasses client.request() to avoid pipeline recursion. Catalog entry is documentation only.

spi.comment: Fetch buvid3/buvid4 device fingerprint seeds. Implemented at src/core/buvid.ts; bypasses client.request(). Catalog entry is documentation only.

active_buvid.comment: Register buvid fingerprint with B-zhan device library. Implemented at src/core/buvid.ts; bypasses client.request(). Catalog entry is documentation only.
